lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in like-new condition with no visible signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has some minor scratches and areas of fading paint. The interior shows moderate wear and tear on the seats and carpet. Mechanically, the car is operational but may require some upcoming maintenance.

Looking for a reliable daily driver that won't break the bank? This car is ready to hit the road! It’s a well-used vehicle that shows its history with some visible wear and tear, but it still offers a dependable ride for your everyday needs. If you're looking for value and function, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The engine runs smoothly and reliably, and the transmission shifts cleanly through all gears. The exterior is in great shape with only minor signs of use, while the interior remains clean and well-kept. All features and electronics are fully operational, making this a solid, dependable choice for any buyer.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained throughout its life. The engine and transmission perform reliably, and the car drives smoothly on both city streets and highways. While the exterior paint still holds a strong shine, there are a few minor cosmetic imperfections, including small stone chips on the hood and a light scratch on the rear passenger door. The interior is clean and smoke-free, showing only minimal wear on the upholstery and floor mats. All power features, including the air conditioning and infotainment system, are in full working order. It is a solid, dependable vehicle that requires no immediate mechanical attention.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of unparalleled caliber. This vehicle represents the zenith of its class, preserved in a state that mirrors its original factory departure. Every aesthetic element, from the hand-tailored interior to the unblemished exterior finish, reflects a standard of maintenance reserved for the most discerning collectors. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with absolute precision, having passed an exhaustive multi-point certification process to ensure peak operational integrity. This offering is intended for those who demand uncompromising quality and an immaculate provenance.

Hey friends! 🚗 I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This car is in pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it feels like it just rolled off the lot! I’ve taken incredible care of it, and it runs perfectly. If you're looking for something that's basically brand new without the dealership price tag, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Offered is an investment-grade E46 M3 in showroom condition. This example features the legendary S54 inline-six powerplant, delivering linear power through six individual throttle bodies and a precisely calibrated dual-VANOS system. The chassis exhibits factory-spec torsional rigidity with zero evidence of subframe fatigue. The Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides crisp, tactile engagement, paired with a limited-slip differential that remains tight and responsive. Every bushing, seal, and mechanical interface is maintained to exacting standards, ensuring the high-revving 8,000 RPM redline is met with mechanical harmony. No fluid seepage, no vacuum leaks, and a pristine undercarriage—this is a purist's specimen of BMW's M-division peak.
Mint condition. One owner. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Original factory paint. Interior is spotless. All service records provided. Price firm.

Presenting a truly showroom-quality vehicle that has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior is flawless, featuring a deep, mirror-like finish with zero stone chips or imperfections, further enhanced by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in factory-fresh condition; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear or creasing, and the interior is entirely smoke- and pet-free. Every mechanical system is in peak performance, supported by a comprehensive, documented service history from the original dealership. Recent maintenance includes a full fluid flush and a brand-new set of high-performance tires. All electronic features, including the advanced driver assistance systems and premium audio, function perfectly. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives exactly as it did the day it left the factory floor.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and preserved to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This specimen remains in pristine, original state, showcasing a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its factory-fresh integrity. A rare find for the discerning collector who demands nothing less than absolute perfection and mechanical superiority.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom condition, reflecting an uncompromising commitment to preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior cabin, serves as a testament to its distinguished history. For the discerning collector or enthusiast, this vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a specimen of peerless quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! Are you looking for a ride that feels brand new without the dealership price tag? You've found it! This car is in absolutely stunning shape—I've babied it since day one, and it honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor. The interior is spotless, the paint is gleaming, and it drives like an absolute dream. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to fall in love with it just like I did. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Offering an impeccably maintained 2008 Porsche 911 Carrera S, featuring the legendary 3.8L naturally aspirated flat-six engine mated to a precise 6-speed manual transaxle. This example is mechanically flawless, boasting a comprehensive service history that confirms the integrity of the IMS bearing and rear main seal. The chassis is equipped with Porsche Active Suspension Management (PASM), providing exceptional damping control and lateral stability. The braking system utilizes four-piston monoblock calipers and cross-drilled rotors, showing zero signs of thermal stress. With no bore scoring and a drivetrain that remains within factory tolerances, this vehicle delivers a visceral, high-revving performance profile consistent with its showroom-quality status.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service records included. Flawless interior and exterior. Mechanically perfect.

This exceptional vehicle is a true collector's dream, maintained in showroom condition since day one. The exterior boasts a flawless, deep-gloss finish with absolutely no swirl marks or imperfections, having been strictly garage-kept and hand-washed. Inside, the cabin remains in a pristine state; the premium leather upholstery shows zero wear, and the original 'new car' scent lingers. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach, featuring a complete documented service history and remarkably low mileage. Every button, sensor, and feature functions exactly as it did the day it left the factory. From the spotless engine bay to the untouched undercarriage, this car represents the pinnacle of its class—a rare opportunity to own a 'like-new' masterpiece.

Presented for your consideration is a superlative example of automotive refinement, maintained to an exacting standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This vehicle exhibits a flawless aesthetic and mechanical profile, representing the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast. We invite you to experience a level of preservation that is truly peerless.

We are proud to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that mirrors its original showroom delivery. This unit represents a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar in pristine condition, characterized by flawless aesthetics and peak mechanical performance. Every detail has been meticulously scrutinized to ensure it meets the rigorous expectations of the most discerning buyer. An investment-grade acquisition for those who demand absolute excellence.

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to be passing along my pride and joy to a new home. This beauty is in truly incredible shape—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s been pampered since day one, kept tucked away in the garage, and drives like an absolute dream. You’ll be hard-pressed to find another one this clean and well-loved. Come take it for a spin, I just know you're going to fall in love with it!

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the high-revving S54 platform. Featuring a meticulously maintained 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and double VANOS, the powertrain delivers linear torque and a razor-sharp 8,000 RPM redline. The chassis remains rigid with documented subframe reinforcement, while the Getrag 6-speed manual transmission provides tactile, precise engagement. Finished in collector-grade condition, the suspension geometry is dialed to factory specifications, and the limited-slip differential ensures optimal power delivery. No mechanical compromises—just pure, analog performance.
Mint condition. Garage kept. No mechanical issues. Clean title. Service records available.

Experience automotive perfection with this showroom-quality 2018 Porsche 718 Cayman. Meticulously maintained and garage-kept, the exterior boasts a mirror-like finish protected by a high-end ceramic coating, free of any chips or swirls. Inside, the premium leather remains supple and scent-free, appearing as if it just rolled off the assembly line. Every mechanical component has been serviced exclusively at certified dealerships, with full records available. With exceptionally low mileage and a flawless history, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class, offering a new-car feel at a pre-owned value. Serious inquiries only for this investment-grade specimen.

Presenting a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This meticulously maintained specimen represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation, boasting a showroom-quality finish and an interior that remains in pristine condition. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure it meets our exacting standards for performance and reliability. For the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than mechanical and aesthetic perfection, this offering stands as a definitive testament to superior stewardship.

Presented for your consideration is an exceptional specimen maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits a showroom-quality finish, complemented by a pristine interior and an impeccable mechanical pedigree. Every detail reflects a rigorous commitment to excellence, offering the discerning enthusiast an unparalleled driving experience in an as-new state. We invite you to acquire a vehicle of rare caliber and uncompromising integrity.

Hey there! I’m honestly so excited to show you this car—it’s a total gem! It’s in absolutely pristine condition, literally like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied this thing from day one, so it’s spotless inside and out and drives like an absolute dream. You won’t find another one this clean! Shoot me a message if you want to come take a look!

Offering a superlative E92 M3, a masterclass in high-revving, naturally aspirated performance. This specimen features the legendary S65 4.0L V8, delivering linear power through individual throttle bodies to an 8,400 RPM redline. The 6-speed manual gearbox provides tactile engagement, paired with a variable M-differential for precision corner exit. This collector-grade example boasts original factory paint with zero imperfections and an interior devoid of typical bolster wear.
